overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a busy multi-lane street with neon-lit retaining walls, under a concrete overpass, up an elevated yellow walkway past the Militech building, and into a covered pedestrian corridor with other pedestrians. The scene features futuristic skyscrapers, heavy neon signage, and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban street with neon-lit retaining wall

events.description: camera lowers from looking up at skyscrapers to street level
white sedan passes by on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a busy street with colorful neon walls

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: tall dark buildings with neon advertisements and holographic displays
concrete wall with shifting colored neon lights in green, purple, and yellow
elevated highway structure crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of towering futuristic skyscrapers before descending to street level. The player walks along a multi-lane road with a brightly colored neon retaining wall on the right and palm trees on the left. Moderate traffic flows past, including a white sedan, while the concrete overpass looms ahead.

events.description: entering the shadow of the concrete overpass, ambient light drops significantly
red sports car passes by on the left side under the overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass alongside moving traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving under the overpass

entered.detail: large structural columns holding up the overpass deck

segments.scene_description: The player enters the shadowy space beneath the concrete overpass where natural light is blocked. Large support pillars line the right side while vehicles, including a red sports car, continue to pass through the covered roadway. The environment shifts from open and colorful to enclosed and dimly lit.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated yellow pedestrian ramp alongside roadway

events.description: exiting the underpass into brighter daylight
turning right onto the elevated yellow walkway and ascending the ramp

agents.ego_description: walking up the curved yellow ramp structure alongside the road

entered.detail: curved pedestrian ramp with yellow painted surface and integrated edge lighting
tall corporate building with Militech logo and red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into brighter light, the player turns onto a distinctive yellow elevated walkway. The path curves upward alongside the road, with the massive Militech building becoming visible on the left. The concrete overpass recedes to the left as the ascent continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings approaching covered tunnel

events.description: approaching the covered pedestrian tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated path toward a covered pedestrian corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: dark tunnel-like structure with overhead lighting at the end of the path
transparent safety barrier along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the elevated walkway, the player approaches a covered pedestrian tunnel. The Militech building looms large on the left while a glass railing lines the right edge. Other pedestrians appear, including one in a blue jacket walking toward the camera, as the entrance to the covered corridor grows closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with commercial signage

events.description: crowd density increases as entering the covered market area
approaching building entrance with large neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor among other pedestrians toward a commercial entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red top walking alongside
group of pedestrians walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: large pink and red illuminated advertisement sign for Watson Whore
colorful digital billboard displaying braindance products
dark metal ceiling with rectangular light panels

segments.scene_description: The player enters the covered pedestrian corridor where the crowd density increases to moderate. Walking among other pedestrians, the camera approaches a commercial entrance marked by bright neon signs including a prominent 'Watson Whore' advertisement and braindance displays. The environment is fully enclosed with artificial overhead lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, open city street into a densely crowded, enclosed commercial corridor. It begins by descending from a view of towering skyscrapers to a multi-lane road lined with palm trees and a brightly colored neon retaining wall. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts from open light to a dim, shadowy space beneath a concrete overpass supported by massive pillars. The scene then opens back into the light as the player ascends a curving yellow elevated walkway, passing the massive Militech building before approaching a glass-railed pedestrian tunnel. Finally, the camera enters a fully enclosed corridor with artificial lighting, moving through a moderate crowd toward bright neon advertisements and braindance displays.
